name: Elis Motors
description_short: Used car dealership in New Jersey offering vehicle sales, financing, and extended warranties. Specializes in sub-prime auto financing for buyers with poor or no credit history.
description_long:
Elis Motors Corp is an established used car dealership based in Irvington, New Jersey, operating since 2003. The company operates a physical showroom at 777 Springfield Ave and serves multiple towns across Essex County and surrounding areas including East Orange, Union, Elizabeth, Newark, and Orange. Their primary business model centers on buying, inspecting, and selling used vehicles while providing in-house financing solutions.

The dealership offers a broad inventory of used cars, SUVs, minivans, trucks, and pickups across 16 major brands including Toyota, Honda, Ford, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Lexus, and others. Vehicle pricing ranges from under $10,000 to over $25,000. All inventory vehicles are inspected before sale and eligible for extended service contracts and warranty coverage. The financing department claims partnerships with multiple banks and lending institutions throughout New Jersey and emphasizes sub-prime lending capabilities.

Elis Motors distinguishes itself through explicit focus on sub-prime financing for consumers with challenged credit profiles. Their website marketing emphasizes "good, bad or no credit history" and promises financing approval despite credit concerns. They advertise pre-approval in seconds and position themselves as specialists in auto finance with multiple lending sources. The dealership offers extended warranties and service contracts as additional revenue streams.

However, this company is fundamentally a used car dealer and finance company, not a consumer finance lender in the traditional sense. They are not offering personal loans, emergency cash, or credit-building products—they are facilitating auto purchases through dealership financing. The absence of published interest rates, loan terms, or transparent financing structures makes independent assessment difficult. Used car dealerships with sub-prime lending practices carry inherent risks including markup pricing, predatory loan terms, and vehicle quality concerns that merit consumer caution.
pros: Serves multiple New Jersey locations (Irvington, East Orange, Union, Elizabeth and surrounding areas)
Wide vehicle selection across 16 major brands with inventory pricing tiers from under $10K to over $25K
All vehicles inspected before sale with optional extended service contracts and warranty coverage
Multiple financing sources and partnerships with NJ banks and lending institutions
Explicit sub-prime lending program for consumers with poor or no credit history
Same-day or next-business-day financing pre-approval claims
cons: No published interest rates, APR ranges, or transparent loan term disclosures on website
Sub-prime auto financing historically associated with high markups and unfavorable consumer terms
No independent verification of vehicle quality, inspection standards, or warranty terms
Used car dealership financing structures carry inherent predatory lending risks
No customer reviews, ratings, or third-party verification of service quality available on website
best_for: Used car buyers in New Jersey with limited access to traditional auto financing
Consumers with poor credit history seeking vehicle purchase options
Buyers shopping for specific used vehicle brands in the Essex County area
diagnosis: Elis Motors Corp is a used car dealership specializing in sub-prime auto financing, not a consumer finance lender. This company is best for New Jersey consumers actively seeking vehicle purchases with financing who have poor credit access. Primary caveat: the lack of transparent interest rates, APR disclosures, and independent verification of loan terms creates substantial risk for predatory pricing and unfavorable loan structures typical of sub-prime auto dealership financing.
services: Used car sales (cars, SUVs, minivans, trucks, pickups)
Vehicle inventory search by make, model, year, and price range
Sub-prime auto financing for poor/no credit borrowers
Extended service contracts and warranty coverage
Vehicle financing partnerships with multiple NJ banks and lenders
Financing for consumers with good, bad, or no credit history
Driving directions and showroom visit planning
